title: Accounts Assistant
description:
Job Description

The Accounts Assistant supports daily accounting and finance administration, primarily in accounts receivable and accounts payable functions. This role is administrative in nature and is suitable for junior or entry-level candidates who are detail-oriented and comfortable with structured, routine accounting processes.

Roles & Responsibilities

  • Support accounts payable (AP) and accounts receivable (AR) functions, including invoicing, payment recording, and follow-ups

  • Assist with bank reconciliations and basic month-end closing activities

  • Maintain accurate accounting records, journal entries, and supporting documentation

  • Organize and maintain proper filing of accounting documents (softcopy and hardcopy)

  • Assist with audit preparation and compliance documentation when required

  • Prepare basic schedules and summaries for internal reporting

  • Perform ad-hoc accounting and administrative duties as assigned

Requirements

  • Diploma in Accounting, Finance, Business, or a related field

  • Entry-level candidates are welcome; prior experience is an advantage but not mandatory

  • Basic understanding of accounts payable and accounts receivable processes

  • Familiarity with Microsoft Excel and accounting software

  • Careful, reliable, and able to follow established procedures

  • Willingness to learn and able to work independently on routine tasks

  • Good communication skills and a positive work attitude

postedCompany.description:
About us


Indigo Precious Metals Group (IPM Group Pte Ltd) is a leading Singapore-based bullion specialist providing clients with a full spectrum of services in physical precious metals trading, secure vaulting, and wealth preservation solutions.


With a strong reputation for trust, transparency, and operational excellence, IPM Group serves a global clientele ranging from private investors to institutional clients. Our operations are supported by rigorous compliance standards and integrated logistics covering procurement, trading, storage, and delivery of gold, silver, platinum, and other precious metals.


As an MAS-registered and LBMA-affiliated company, IPM Group upholds the highest standards of accountability and precision in financial and inventory reporting. Joining our team means becoming part of a dynamic environment that values integrity, attention to detail, and continuous professional growth.

  • Unwavering commitment to professional service support at all times.
  • Access to the world’s most pre-eminent and secure storage facilities.
  • Wholly segregated and fully allocated vaulted accounts, held exclusively in each client’s family name.
  • Highly competitive rates designed to deliver superior value to our clients.
  • Comprehensive market research and advisory support to empower informed client decisions.
postedCompany.name: INDIGO PRECIOUS METALS PTE. LTD.
